name: Metro Ticari ve Mali Yatirimlar Holding A.S.
summary: Metro Ticari ve Mali Yatirimlar Holding A.S. operates in tourism, food, mining, and energy sectors. The company operates a fleet of buses under the METRO brand in Turkey and internationally; offers maintenance, repair, and spare parts for Metro buses; and operates 25 petrol stations and 59 stopover facilities. It is also involved in the breeding, rearing, caring, fattening, butchering, conservation, purchase, and sale of sheep, cattle, bovine, and poultry. In addition, the company engages in the gross or direct sale of electricity to consumers. Further, it extracts, processes, enriches, refines, buys, and rents its under and above ground ores and natural resources. Additionally, the company operates as a tour operator; engages in warehousing activities; and invests in a cake factory, paddy factory, fruit garden, and hotel. The company was formerly known as Van-Et A.S. Metro Ticari ve Mali Yatirimlar Holding A.S. was founded in 1977 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
